title: TotalOrderPartitioner
description: The TotalOrderPartitioner class is a partitioner that effects a total order by reading split points from an externally generated source. It implements a trie of the first bytes of the split points if the key type is BinaryComparable and uses a binary search of the partition keyset otherwise. The data flowing in is the configuration, and the data flowing out is the partitioning of the keys.

DESCRIPTION:
The TotalOrderPartitioner class is a partitioner that effects a total order by reading split points from an externally generated source. It implements a trie of the first bytes of the split points if the key type is BinaryComparable and uses a binary search of the partition keyset otherwise. The data flowing in is the configuration, and the data flowing out is the partitioning of the keys.
